free_text: T=1 states in 20Ne as compound resonances induced by
The outgoing particles were detected by means
of silicon surface barrier detectors, one detector was
placed at 158.13 degr. (laboratory) as a monitor.
A C2F6 gas target(99% purity) was used.
The experimental errors are due to uncertainties
involved in the measurements of the gas pressure, the
beam current and in the normalization of the cross-
sections to those of the 40Ar(p,p) elastic scattering.
